name: Lanebury Growth Capital Ltd.
summary: Lanebury Growth Capital Ltd. operates as an investment company. It focuses on building a portfolio of investments in technology start-ups. The company was formerly known as NU2U Resources Corp. and changed its name to Lanebury Growth Capital Ltd. in April 2017. Lanebury Growth Capital Ltd. was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
